home.title: Discover Your Path
home.subtitle: Rural Youth Guide
home.description: Find your career path with personalized guidance, skill development, and local opportunities designed for rural youth.

howWeHelp.title: How We Help You Succeed
howWeHelp.subtitle: Personalized guidance to help rural youth discover and pursue meaningful career pathways.

interests.desc: Identify your strengths and career interests through our personalized assessment tools.

skills.desc: Access tailored resources for developing the skills you need for your chosen path.

connect.title: Opportunity Connect
connect.desc: Find relevant government schemes, exams, and job opportunities in your region.

stories.subtitle: Real youth from rural Karnataka who found their path.

impact.title: Real Impact, Measurable Change

mentor.title: Pathways AI Mentor
mentor.subtitle: Gemini · Whisper · Multilingual
mentor.greeting:
Namaste! 🙏 I'm your career mentor.

You can type, or tap 🎙️ to speak in Kannada, Hindi, Telugu, or English. I'll understand and reply in your language.
